_comment: Project-local file -> skill/rule dispatch map for file-dispatch.mjs. Each entry in `map` fires when an Edit/Write targets a path matching `pattern` (a JS regex source, matched case-insensitively against the forward-slashed path). `skills` are invoked; `rules` are file names under .claude/rules-topical/ to read first. This file is DATA: edit it per project. Empty `map` = the hook is a no-op. Delete the `_examples` key or copy entries into `map` to activate them.
